entities.name: Orchestrator
entities.context: Coordinates Workers 1-5 in sequence for reflection processing pipeline

entities.name: Worker 1: Ingest
entities.context: Polls Google Drive, downloads audio files, transcribes using AssemblyAI

entities.name: Worker 2: Classify
entities.context: Analyzes transcripts with multi-label classification and confidence scoring

entities.name: Worker 4: Generate
entities.context: Creates block content, applies voice profiles, auto-approves high-confidence blocks

entities.name: Worker 5: Suggest
entities.context: Pattern detection across reflections, suggests new block types (weekly)

entities.name: AssemblyAI
entities.context: External transcription service used by Worker 1

entities.name: Google Drive
entities.context: Source folder for audio files polled by Worker 1

entities.name: Voice profiles
entities.context: Applied during content generation by Worker 4

entities.name: Compound synthesis (B90/B91)
entities.context: Specific synthesis types produced by synthesizer

entities.name: Pattern detection
entities.context: Technique used by suggester to identify recurring themes

relationships.context: First step in reflection processing sequence
Polls folder for new audio files
Maps content to block type categories
